sql.trim: t1.SESSION_NAME, t1.CREA_TIME_DATE_TJ, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.PARTY_TYPE, t1.ATTR9, t1.CREA_TIME_DATE, t1.ATTR4, t1.PARTY_NAME, t1.SESSION_TYPE, t1.ATTR3, t1.ATTR2, t1.ATTR1, t1.SESSION_JD, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTR8, t1.ATTR7, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.ATTR6, t1.ZKDYDH, t1.ATTR5, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.ATTR12, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.ATTR13, t1.ATTR10, t1.ATTR11, t1.ATTR16, t1.CREA_TIME, t1.ATTR17, t1.ATTR14, t1.ATTR15, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.ORG_FILE, t1.PARTY_ORG_CONTENT, t1.JWYCH, t1.ATTR18, t1.ATTR19, t1.WYYCH, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.SESSION_ID, t1.PARTY_ID, t1.CREA_TIME_DATE_TJYB,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_PARTY_ORG_INFO t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_PARTY_ORG_INFO
SESSION_NAME,
CREA_TIME_DATE_TJ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
PARTY_TYPE,
ATTR9,
CREA_TIME_DATE,
ATTR4,
PARTY_NAME,
SESSION_TYPE,
ATTR3,
ATTR2,
ATTR1,
SESSION_JD,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ATTR8,
ATTR7,
ATTR20,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ATTR6,
ZKDYDH,
ATTR5,
CREATED_BY,
ATTR12,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ATTR13,
ATTR10,
ATTR11,
ATTR16,
CREA_TIME,
ATTR17,
ATTR14,
ATTR15,
CREATION_DATE,
ORG_FILE,
PARTY_ORG_CONTENT,
JWYCH,
ATTR18,
ATTR19,
WYYCH,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SESSION_ID,
PARTY_ID,
CREA_TIME_DATE_TJYB,
#{sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creaTimeDateTj,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creaTimeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sessionJd,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr20,jdbcType = BLOB},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{zkdydh,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{orgFile,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyOrgContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{jwych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{wyych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creaTimeDateTjyb,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},

insert into DYN_PARTY_ORG_INFO( SESSION_NAME , CREA_TIME_DATE_TJ , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , PARTY_TYPE , ATTR9 , CREA_TIME_DATE , ATTR4 , PARTY_NAME , SESSION_TYPE , ATTR3 , ATTR2 , ATTR1 , SESSION_JD , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ATTR8 , ATTR7 , ATTR20 , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ATTR6 , ZKDYDH , ATTR5 , CREATED_BY , ATTR12 , LAST_UPDATED_BY , ATTR13 , ATTR10 , ATTR11 , ATTR16 , CREA_TIME , ATTR17 , ATTR14 , ATTR15 , CREATION_DATE , ORG_FILE , PARTY_ORG_CONTENT , JWYCH , ATTR18 , ATTR19 , WYYCH , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , SESSION_ID , PARTY_ID , CREA_TIME_DATE_TJYB )
select #{item.sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creaTimeDateTj,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creaTimeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sessionJd,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr20,jdbcType = BLOB} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.zkdydh,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.orgFile,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyOrgContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.jwych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.wyych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creaTimeDateTjyb,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_PARTY_ORG_INFO
SESSION_NAME = #{sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREA_TIME_DATE_TJ = #{creaTimeDateTj,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREA_TIME_DATE = #{creaTimeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SESSION_TYPE = #{sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SESSION_JD = #{sessionJd,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = BLOB},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ZKDYDH = #{zkdydh,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREA_TIME = #{creaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ORG_FILE = #{orgFile,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_ORG_CONTENT = #{partyOrgContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JWYCH = #{jwych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
WYYCH = #{wyych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SESSION_ID = #{sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREA_TIME_DATE_TJYB = #{creaTimeDateTjyb,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_PARTY_ORG_INFO set SESSION_NAME = #{sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME_DATE_TJ = #{creaTimeDateTj,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME_DATE = #{creaTimeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_TYPE = #{sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_JD = #{sessionJd,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = BLOB} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ZKDYDH = #{zkdydh,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME = #{creaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ORG_FILE = #{orgFile,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ORG_CONTENT = #{partyOrgContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JWYCH = #{jwych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , WYYCH = #{wyych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_ID = #{sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME_DATE_TJYB = #{creaTimeDateTjyb,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_PARTY_ORG_INFO set SESSION_NAME = #{item.sessionName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME_DATE_TJ = #{item.creaTimeDateTj,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_TYPE = #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME_DATE = #{item.creaTimeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR4 = #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_TYPE = #{item.sessionType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR1 = #{item.attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_JD = #{item.sessionJd,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{item.attr20,jdbcType = BLOB} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ZKDYDH = #{item.zkdydh,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR5 = #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME = #{item.creaTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR17 = #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ORG_FILE = #{item.orgFile,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ORG_CONTENT = #{item.partyOrgContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JWYCH = #{item.jwych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR18 = #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR19 = #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , WYYCH = #{item.wyych,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SESSION_ID = #{item.sessionId,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PARTY_ID = #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREA_TIME_DATE_TJYB = #{item.creaTimeDateTjyb,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
